purpose: A provider is eligible for conservative route advice only after its adapter, current canaries, task-family evidence and failure handling are all observable.

required_checks.label: 官方 CLI 与登录边界
required_checks.evidence: Local configuration contains only the official CLI path; no authentication material is read or stored.

required_checks.label: Adapter 合同与 fixture
required_checks.evidence: A versioned adapter declares models, permissions, lifecycle and deterministic fixture coverage.

required_checks.label: 最小权限 canary
required_checks.evidence: Current-generation local_audit and code_change canaries match the exact CLI hash and tuple.

required_checks.label: 真实任务族证据
required_checks.evidence: At least two Codex-accepted attempts exist for the exact tuple and task family.

required_checks.label: 失败恢复
required_checks.evidence: Provider failures are classified into a bounded recovery action and regression fixture.

required_checks.label: 文档、成本与敏感信息边界
required_checks.evidence: Public documentation states cost/policy limits and no secrets, account data or provider databases are included.
